ehua.author: Itzli / Mero Mero S3
ehua.alt: rise; to get up; to leave; to set out

xiuhtlahcuiloh.author: Itzli / Mero Mero S3
xiuhtlahcuiloh.alt: (he or she is) a person who writes annals

mapohpohua.author: Itzli / Mero Mero S3
mapohpohua.alt: clean, wipe or dry the hands

mahposteki.author: Itzli / Mero Mero S3
mahposteki.alt: break one's arm or hand, to fracture one's upper limb

quiza.author: Itzli / Mero Mero S3
quiza.alt: go out; to exit; to emerge; to come out

comalli.author: Itzli / Mero Mero S3
comalli.alt: Comal, a pan used to grill tortillas

-pan.author: Itzli / Mero Mero S3
-pan.alt: A locative suffix: in or at the residence, home or lodgings of the root noun
